element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Unlimited supply establishes basic offense; projectiles become primary ranged tool
Found in item boxes; encourages resource management and tactical weapon switching
Auto-triggers when Batman gets close to enemies; deals more damage than projectiles, creating risk-reward positioning
Each level culminates with villain boss; difficulty escalates with recognizable Batman rogues gallery
Central villain orchestrating Gotham freeze scheme; liberated other villains from prison
First major villain introduction; iconic Batman adversary
Liberated criminal; appears as stage-ending threat

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections between enemy encounters
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Run-and-gun style with alternating enemy combat sections and platforming challenges; boss encounters punctuate level climaxes; respawn system maintains forward momentum without severe punishment

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Item boxes containing limited-ammo weapons scattered throughout stages; extra lives and health refills reward exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces basic platforming and projectile attacks with generic machine/thug bosses; establishes core combat loop
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Liberated villains (Two-Face, Mad Hatter, Mr. Freeze) escalate boss difficulty; limited-ammo resource management becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminates with Joker and Harley Quinn; requires mastery of all mechanics (platforming, projectile precision, melee positioning, weapon switching)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level subdivided into multiple stages, each ending with enemy/boss encounter; progression from generic threats to named Batman rogues
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Theater stage (Mad Hatter boss) and Frozen office building (Mr. Freeze boss)

notable_level_patterns.description: Alternates between platforming sections and combat encounters; encourages forward momentum without excessive backtracking
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic stages feature running sections interrupted by thug groups, leading to boss arena

notable_level_patterns.description: Item boxes with limited-ammo weapons provide tactical decision points; health and extra life pickups reward cautious play and exploration
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout all stages; frequency of item boxes indicates stage difficulty

sources_used: wikipedia: The Adventures of Batman & Robin (video game)
